REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2230 Old Creek Circle, Pittsburg, Ca 94565)
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melonie Miles appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Miles stated that the sale was confirmed about three months ago, that there was a discrepancy in the order regarding the percentage of ownership, that it has been cleared up with the title company and that she expects escrow to close within 15 to 30-days. No overbidders were present in Court or remotely. The sale was confirmed at $375,000.00 for 100% of the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The estate holds a 67% interest in the property. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked account is set for November 9, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2230 Old Creek Circle, Pittsburg, Ca, 94565)
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melonie Miles appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
Carla Winter (Agent) appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
Chris Rojas appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

At the first calling of this matter, the Court noted that the Buyer was not on the courtcall line. The matter was passed and recalled at the end of the calendar for the purpose of Ms. Miles contacting the Buyer and making arrangements for a telephonic appearance.

The Court noted that the notice did not have the terms of the sale, but the publication did and that the terms of the sale were not in the petition. The Court read the material terms of the sale and informed Mr. Rojas that he was entitled to receive notice of the sale terms. Mr. Rojas waives notice. Discussion was held regarding bond. Ms. Miles stated that there is nothing else in the estate and that she decided to do a blocked account instead of a bond. The Court explained to Ms. Miles that the funds need to be deposited into two individual accounts at two different banks. The sale was confirmed at $375,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the publication. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is set for September 9, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Miles is to provide a proposed order on the Judicial Council Form to the Probate Examiner (Ms. Hilton) today.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Jul-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melonie Miles in Propria Persona.

Ms. Miles stated that there is $24,000.00 a year in gross income, that she is requiring full authority, that she and her Sister have been managing the house and paying the mortgage, and that they are concerned that if the insurance company or Wells Fargo have any questions, or they want to sell the house, they do not have any authority to do so. Ms. Miles also stated that the house is the only thing that is not in the trust, questions why the Court is requiring a bond when all of the Beneficiaries have waived bond, and stated that there is no money to pay an attorney or pay for a bond. The Court explained that it has authority to require a bond for liquid assets to protect the beneficiaries and any creditors. Todd Christiansen (Bond Agent) informed the Court that the cost for a bond would be $125.00. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review and modification of the order). Bond in the amount of $24,000.00 is required. The Court informed Ms. Miles that she can not sell the house without Court approval, that future hearings dates will be set for filing of an inventory and appraisal, as well as a petition for final distribution and that the Probate Examiner will inform her of the hearing dates.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melonie Miles in Propria Persona.

Ms. Miles stated that she is attempting to get authority to administer the property and that the property is to only thing that is not in the trust. The Court informed Ms. Miles that she could either post a bond in the amount of $374,000.00 and be appointed with unlimited authority, or be appointed with limited authority which will require her getting approval of the Court to sell the property with a bond in the amount of $24,000.00 to cover the rental income. The Court also explained that the purpose of having a bond in place is to protect the interest of the Beneficiaries, and suggested Ms. Miles getting an Attorney to represent her and obtain waivers of bond. The matter was passed to the end of the calendar to allow Ms. Miles the opportunity to think about it. Upon the matter being recalled, Ms. Miles requested a continuance stating that she has to talk to an Attorney regarding bonding and what that means. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
